debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
x : C
⊢ ⨆ p ∈ D, p x = ⊤

proof:
by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.ext_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply,
    PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at h
  exact h x
failed_attempts:
by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [← h, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_obj]

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_eq, Submodule.iSup_eq_top] at h ⊢
  intro y
  obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := h x y
  exact ⟨w, hw⟩

by
  have h := congr_fun (congr_arg (fun p => p.toFun) D.sSup_eq_top) x
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at h
  convert h using 1
  exact (iSup_subtype'' (SetLike.coe D) (fun p => p x)).symm

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  convert this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  convert this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply]

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  exact this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.eq_top_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply] at h
  exact h x

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  convert this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  convert this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  convert this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_eq, Submodule.iSup_eq_top] at h ⊢
  intro y
  obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := h x y
  exact ⟨w, hw⟩

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [← PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, h, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply]

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.eq_top_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply] at h
  exact h x

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.eq_top_iff] at h ⊢
  exact fun m => h m x

by
  have := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.ext_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_obj, 
             PersistenceSubmodule.top_obj] at this
  exact this x

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_eq, Submodule.iSup_eq_top] at h ⊢
  intro y
  obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := h x y
  exact ⟨w, hw⟩

by
  have := D.sSup_eq_top
  rw [SetLike.ext_iff] at this
  simpa using this x

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply]
  rfl

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply]

by
  rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply, ← D.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply]

by
  simp only [← PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_obj, D.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.top_obj]

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_eq, Submodule.iSup_eq_top] at h ⊢
  intro y
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h x y
  exact ⟨f, hf⟩

by
  rw [← D.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply]

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [← h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  convert this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_def] at h
  have : (⨆ p ∈ D, p) x = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) x := by rw [h]
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at this
  convert this

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [← h, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply]

by
  have := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [SetLike.coe_sort_coe, ← this]
  rfl
successful_attempts:
by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.ext_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply,
    PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at h
  exact h x

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  rw [PersistenceSubmodule.ext_iff] at h
  specialize h x
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at h
  exact h

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.ext_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply,
    PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply] at h
  exact h x

by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
